engine.handler.tool_call_limit: Models tried the same tool call too many times or model calls returned failures too many times. We stopped it to avoid consuming useless tokens and time.
engine.handler.compact_no_need: The context is small enough and does not need compacting.
engine.handler.compact_error: An error occurred while compacting this session.
engine.handler.reject:
Access denied. You are not allowed to use this bot or this command.
If you believe this is a mistake, please contact the bot owner.
engine.handler.selection_gone: This selection session no longer exists or has timed out. Please try again.
engine.onboard.instruction: Before you start chatting, you need to adopt this Lobster to prevent unauthorized access. Here is what you need to do:
engine.onboard.step1: 1. Open the Manboster window and look for something like `[Manboster Engine] !!! Your Pair Code is xxxxxx! You can enter '/pair xxxxxx' in your dialog window to adopt this Lobster! !!!`.
engine.onboard.step1_note: (If you can't find that window, or you are running Manboster in daemon mode, open your terminal and run 'manboster log' to view live logs.)
engine.onboard.step2: 2. Take that 6-digit code and send it with `/pair`, like `/pair [your 6-digit code]`.
engine.onboard.step3: 3. Let the Lobster validate it. Once confirmed, you can chat freely!
engine.onboard.wish: Wish you a wonderful journey with your Lobster!
engine.onboard.pair_user_error: But we failed to create the user! Error: %s
engine.onboard.pair_failed: Pairing failed. Invalid pair code, please check your code.
engine.gatekeeper.handle_hachimi_all: Hand all off to Hachimi for an hour
engine.cmd.pair_invalid_num: The input is not a valid number.
engine.cmd.start_first_use: If this is your first time, send a message to trigger the pairing process.
engine.cmd.start_not_yours: If this Lobster is not yours, please contact the owner to get access.
engine.cmd.start_commands: You can also use the following commands:
engine.cmd.help_id: /id - Get current user and chat ID
engine.cmd.help_op: /op - Grant operator permission to a user (reply or `/op [userid]`), root required
engine.cmd.help_deop: /deop - Revoke operator permission from a user (reply or `/deop [userid]`), root required
engine.cmd.help_status: /status - Get current session, chat, and context status
engine.cmd.help_save: /save - Save the current session and start a new one
engine.cmd.help_new: /new - Delete the current session data and start a new one
engine.cmd.help_compact: /compact - Compact the current session by summarizing context. Done automatically when context is about to overflow
engine.cmd.help_model: /model - Get or set the current model via `/model [model id]`
engine.cmd.help_session: /session - Get or switch session via `/session [session id]`
engine.cmd.help_provider: /provider - Get or switch provider via `/provider [provider id]`
engine.cmd.help_pair: /pair - Pair with your Lobster via `/pair xxxxxx`
engine.cmd.default_invalid: Sorry, that is not a valid command. Please check for typos.
engine.cmd.session_not_active: No active session, nothing to do.
engine.cmd.save_success:
Saved session `%s` and created session `%s` with provider `%s` and model `%s`.
To change provider or model, use `/provider` or `/model`. To delete and create a new session, use `/new`.
engine.cmd.new_success:
Deleted session `%s` and created session `%s` with provider `%s` and model `%s`.
To change provider or model, use `/provider` or `/model`. To save and create a new session, use `/save`.
engine.cmd.model_list: Available Models (use `/status` to see current model, `/model [id]` to change):
engine.cmd.model_update_error: An error occurred while updating the model for this session.
engine.cmd.model_success: Successfully changed this session's model to `%s`.
engine.cmd.provider_list: Available Providers (use `/status` to see current provider, `/provider [name]` to change — the first model of the provider will be selected automatically):
engine.cmd.provider_update_error: An error occurred while updating the provider for this session.
engine.cmd.provider_success: Successfully changed this session's provider to `%s`, model `%s`.
engine.cmd.session_list: Session List (showing up to 20 latest; use `/status` to see the current session ID):
engine.cmd.session_data_error: An error occurred while retrieving session data.
engine.cmd.session_not_found: The session ID you entered does not exist.
engine.cmd.session_get_error: An error occurred while retrieving the session.
engine.cmd.session_update_error: An error occurred while switching the session.
engine.cmd.status_summary: Chatted %d times (called LLM %d times), provider: `%s`, model: `%s`
engine.cmd.op_not_found: The user you want to grant permission to was not found.
engine.cmd.op_already_admin: That user is already an Administrator.
engine.cmd.op_create_error: An error occurred while creating the user.
engine.cmd.deop_not_found: The user you want to demote was not found.
engine.cmd.deop_find_error: An error occurred while looking up the user.
